title: Smoother Endstone
description: This pack makes the texture of the Minecraft endstone block a lot smoother.
body:
Do you like minecraft crystal PvP? 
well if you do, you most likley know that the minecraft end is used for fighting a lot of the time.
This pack makes the texture of the endstone block a lot smoother and nicer to look at!

pack contains
* Smoother endstone block
